name: @cc-wf-studio/cli
description: Command-line tool for cc-wf-studio: render, validate, and run workflows, plus a stdio MCP server entry.

scripts.build: pnpm run sync:webview && pnpm run sync:skills && tsc && chmod +x dist/cli.js
scripts.sync:webview: rm -rf dist/webview && mkdir -p dist/webview && cp -R ../vscode/src/webview/dist/. dist/webview/
scripts.sync:skills: rm -rf dist/skills && mkdir -p dist/skills && cp -R skills/. dist/skills/
